sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current state analysis
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current nodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 5:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"  color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows={min_r}-{max_r} cols={min_c}-{max_c} hash={n['hash'][:8]}")

# Try clicking on red blocks to change their color
# Red blocks at rows 29-31, 44-46
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 30, 'col': 45}])
print(f"\nAfter MOUSE on top red block (30,45):")
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 5:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"  color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows={min_r}-{max_r} cols={min_c}-{max_c}")
green_total = sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
print(f"Green: {green_total}, completed: {result.get('level_completed')}")

# Try clicking on other red blocks
for pos in [(30, 51), (45, 42), (45, 48)]:
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': pos[0], 'col': pos[1]}])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    green_total = sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
    print(f"MOUSE {pos}: green={green_total}, completed={result.get('level_completed')}")
    if result.get('level_completed'):
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
